pkgmetadata.longdescription: Obsidian is a powerful knowledge base on top of a local folder of plain text Markdown files. Free for personal use, proprietary EULA. Some users have reported that running Obsidian with native Wayland support causes the software to crash; the wayland USE flag installs an extra desktop entry for native Wayland mode.

use.flag: Enable appindicator (system tray) support via dev-libs/libayatana-appindicator.
Install an additional desktop entry that launches Obsidian with native Wayland flags.
